nasb.text: The priest said to them, “Go in peace; your way in which you are going has the Lord’s approval.”

esv.text: And the priest said to them, “Go in peace. The journey on which you go is under the eye of the Lord.”

cnv.text: 祭司對他們說：“你們平安地去吧，你們要走的道路是蒙耶和華悅納的。”

ccb.text: 祭司说：“你们安心去吧，耶和华会一路眷顾你们。”
